page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for parallel computing workloads. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture, paired with 372 GB of system memory. The instance integrates four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs, providing a total of 64 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics are relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and single-threaded gzip compression results. However, the 96 physical cores deliver strong multi-core performance, evidenced by high stress-ng multi-core scores and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory performance is robust, with cached read-only bandwidth reaching 3924.63 GB/sec, though uncached large-block read and write bandwidths remain average. The instance also demonstrates strong performance in Redis SET operations, handling 64.27 million operations per second.

From a resource density perspective, this instance offers a balanced allocation of CPU and memory alongside multi-GPU capabilities, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for parallel processing without the premium cost of high-end tensor-core GPUs. The primary tradeoff is the lack of local NVMe storage and lower single-core clock speeds. This server is suited for workloads such as deep learning inference, video transcoding, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs, 372 GB of RAM, and four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs with 64 GB of total VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, this server does not include local storage but offers a 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While single-core CPU performance is weak, the instance delivers strong multi-core processing and high cached memory bandwidth. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for distributed parallel workloads, offering a high density of mid-range GPUs. This hardware profile is suited for deep learning inference, multi-threaded data decompression, high-throughput Redis databases, and video transcoding.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs, optimized for parallel computing and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge features 96 Intel vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and 4 NVIDIA T4 GPUs for parallel processing and inference workloads.
tagline: A multi-GPU accelerated platform featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and sixty-four gigabytes of video memory for parallel computing and inference.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs and 372 GB of system memory.
Four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM.
30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage.
Strong multi-core CPU and cached memory bandwidth performance.
Suited for deep learning inference, Redis databases, and video transcoding.
